anti_avoidance_and_reporting.95: Impermissible avoidance arrangement under GAAR - an arrangement may be disregarded if its main purpose is to obtain a tax benefit and it satisfies the statutory tainted-element tests.
anti_avoidance_and_reporting.96: Arrangement to lack commercial substance - an arrangement may be treated as lacking commercial substance where legal form and economic substance differ, or it uses round-trip financing, accommodating parties, offsetting elements, or disguises value, source, ownership, or control.
anti_avoidance_and_reporting.270A: Penalty for under-reporting and misreporting of income - generally 50% of the tax payable on under-reported income and 200% of the tax payable on misreported income.
anti_avoidance_and_reporting.271AAD: Penalty for false entry or omitted entry in books of account - penalty equal to the aggregate amount of a false or omitted entry, with a similar penalty on any other person who causes it.

prosecution_and_compliance.276B: Failure to pay to the credit of the Central Government the tax deducted at source - punishable with rigorous imprisonment and fine.
prosecution_and_compliance.276C: Wilful attempt to evade tax, penalty or interest - punishable with rigorous imprisonment and fine, with higher punishment in serious cases.
prosecution_and_compliance.276CC: Failure to furnish returns of income - wilful failure in specified cases is punishable with imprisonment and fine.
